---
title: "Week02"
date: "2025-01-08T20:37:23"
#date-modified: "2023-07-10T20:37:23"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/les.jpg"
categories:
  - "2025"
  - Les Paul
  - Practice
  - TGIAY
---

Wed, 2025-01-08: Tempo: 70 bpm

## Picking Practice

-   Alternate picking, fingers 4-3-2-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

-   Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

## Chrod Practice

-   G Chord, 25 repetitions
-   Cadd9 Chrod, repetitions
-   Chord progression, G - Cadd9, 3 min

## Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

[C]{.underline} C#Db [D]{.underline} D#Eb [E]{.underline} [F]{.underline} F#Gb [G]{.underline} G#Ab [A]{.underline} A#Bb [B]{.underline}

## Video

{{< video https://youtu.be/-aenMhnLNgc >}}

## Gibson Les Paul

Pickup Position: Neck\
Master Volume: 9\
Master Tone: 5

## Zoom G3Xn

Preset: OFF

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 25%\
Rate: 25%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 4.0\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 4.5\
Bass: 7.0\
Middle: 5.0\
Master: 5.0\
Reverb: 2.5

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 10 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant
